examples.title: ADB Health Check
examples.description: Checks whether local adb is available, lists connected devices, and records the selected Android serial.

examples.title: Android Observability Template
examples.description: Captures a governed screenshot and UI tree from the current Android app for operator analysis.

examples.title: Android Deep Link Template
examples.description: Opens an Android deep link and then captures a screenshot for validation.

examples.title: Android UI Tree Analysis
examples.description: Analyzes a captured UI tree, summarizes visible nodes, and finds text matches without requiring a connected device.

examples.title: Android UI Node Tap Dry Run
examples.description: Resolves the center coordinates of a matched UI node and prepares a tap target without requiring adb.

examples.title: Android UI Node Input Dry Run
examples.description: Resolves an editable UI node and prepares a text input action without requiring adb.

examples.title: Android UI Node Wait Selector Template
examples.description: Waits for a node by selector and then taps it on a connected Android device or emulator.

examples.title: Android Login Form Dry Run
examples.description: Builds a high-level login plan by resolving email, password, and submit controls from a UI tree.

examples.title: Android Passkey Auth Dry Run
examples.description: Builds a high-level passkey authentication trigger plan from a UI tree without requiring adb.

examples.title: Android Login Passkey Flow Dry Run
examples.description: Validates the full login plus passkey flow contract from a saved UI tree without requiring adb.

examples.title: Android Login Passkey Flow Template
examples.description: Launches an Android app, waits for login controls, fills credentials, triggers passkey auth, and captures a screenshot.

examples.title: Android WebView Session Handoff
examples.description: Builds a governed session handoff artifact for moving authenticated Android app state into a browser/webview context.

examples.title: Android Runtime WebView Handoff Template
examples.description: Pulls a runtime-exported WebView session handoff artifact from an Android device and records foreground activity state.

examples.title: Android CLI Health Check
examples.description: Checks whether the Android CLI for AI agents binary is available and returns its version.

examples.title: Android CLI Visual Workflow
examples.description: Captures a JSON UI layout and annotated screenshot via Android CLI, then resolves a target label to screen coordinates and taps it.
